title: Hardcore Revive+ [OLD VERSION]
description: An add-on to your world that allows you to revive your friends in Hardcore Mode. Discontinued -- Use the new Hardcore Revive+ instead.
body:
## Hardcore Revive+ has a new version available! Please download the latest version [here](https://modrinth.com/datapack/hardcore-revive-plus).
## Overview
***You need Hardcore mode enabled for this to work!***

Have you ever played Hardcore mode with your friends and one of you died unfairly or in a silly way? Instead of restarting your world, **Hardcore Revive+** aims to keep the thrill of Hardcore mode while making death less punishing.

Instead of permanently being in spectator mode after dying, you become a ghost -- a spectator that is still able to interact with the world and other players. To be revived, another player (if they like you) must craft a **Soul Charm** and throw it at your ghost.

<details>
<summary>Soul Charm Recipe</summary>

![Soul Charm Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a35eab05eb6d3511d2355d980c573bac2e9ff67.png)

</details>

Players can also craft a **Life Jelly**, a potion that grants the player two extra hearts until death. Upon consumption, the potion also grants Absorption 4 and Regeneration 5. *(The recipe includes an enchanted golden apple)*

<details>
<summary>Life Jelly Recipe</summary>

![Life Jelly Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/66adcb5b4f697c212148a252c45a6715f6db03eb.png)

</details>

## Configuration
You can configure settings in-game via the command `/function hcrplus:_settings`.

## Features
- You can can revive other players who have died in Hardcore mode
- Ghosts can possess other players or mobs to grant either buffs or debuffs
- Health is reduced after being revived or crafting a Soul Charm
- Friends not included

## Incompatibilities
- [Hardcore Revive Reloaded](https://modrinth.com/datapack/hardcore-revive-reloaded)
- Any **"Unlock all recipes"** data pack or mod
